title: Intense Smoky Polish Lentils Hash
description: A smoky, silky lentil hash with a Polish twist, perfect for a hearty brunch.
instructions: Rinse the lentils under cold water until the water runs clear.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and sauté the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika to the skillet and stir to coat the vegetables.
Add the lentils and vegetable broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the lentils are tender but still firm, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the fresh dill, lemon juice, salt, and pepper, and cook for another 2 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let the hash rest for 5 minutes to thicken.
Serve the hash warm, garnish with extra dill or a dash of smoked paprika if desired.
Optionally top each portion with a poached egg for added protein.
Enjoy the smoky, silky flavors of this hearty brunch hash.
